items.raw_excerpt: La localidad superó a urbes como Oaxaca, Ciudad de México, Guadalajara y Mérida.
items.summary_en: San Miguel de Allende was recognized as the number one city in Mexico and the world. The town ranked ahead of places such as Oaxaca, Mexico City, Guadalajara, and Merida.
items.summary_ko: 산미겔데아옌데가 멕시코와 세계에서 가장 뛰어난 도시로 인정받았다. 이 도시는 오악사카, 멕시코시티, 과달라하라, 메리다 같은 도시들을 앞섰다.
items.title_en: San Miguel de Allende named top city
items.title_ko: 산미겔데아옌데, 최고의 도시로 인정받아
items.title_original: Reconocen a San Miguel de Allende como “Ciudad Número 1 de México y el Mundo” - La Jornada

items.raw_excerpt: Margaret Mooy volunteered for 18 years with the Architectural Conservancy of Ontario’s Collingwood branch
items.summary_en: Margaret Mooy was surprised during her mahjong game with an Ontario Senior of the Year award. She volunteered for 18 years with the Collingwood branch of the Architectural Conservancy of Ontario.
items.summary_ko: 마거릿 무이는 마작을 하던 중 온타리오 올해의 노인상을 깜짝 수상했다. 그는 온타리오 건축보존협회 콜링우드 지부에서 18년 동안 자원봉사를 했다.
items.title_en: Mahjong Game Paused for Senior Award Surprise
items.title_ko: 마작 게임 중 받은 깜짝 노인상
items.title_original: Woman's Mahjong game cut short for surprise Ontario Senior of the Year award - Village Report

items.raw_excerpt: A estação pluviométrica do Sistema Alerta Rio na região anotou, das 12h de segunda-feira (15) até a tarde desta terça-feira (16), 254,6 milímetros (mm) de chuva. Tal volume é 146,1 mm superior à média para junho (108,5 mm).
items.summary_en: A rain gauge in Rocinha recorded 254.6 mm of rain from Monday noon to Tuesday afternoon. That was more than twice the usual June average of 108.5 mm.
items.summary_ko: 리우데자네이루 호시냐 지역의 우량계가 월요일 정오부터 화요일 오후까지 254.6mm의 비를 기록했다. 이는 6월 평균인 108.5mm의 두 배를 넘는 양이다.
items.title_en: Rocinha Rain Was More Than Twice the June Average
items.title_ko: 호시냐 강우량, 6월 평균의 두 배 넘어
items.title_original: Chuva na Rocinha superou em mais que duas vezes a média de junho

items.raw_excerpt: In the European Union, 2018 has been designated the year of cultural heritage. Exhibits, conferences and seminars devoted to a new understanding of heritage as a process of discovering history and culture will take place around Europe. The Republic of Moldova also has a newfound appreciation for its heritage, with residents discovering that mammoths and Neanderthals were neighbours of their ancestors and that a Swedish king once lived in a Moldovan village. The past meets the future In the last
items.summary_en: A story looks at Moldova's local heritage. Residents are finding links to mammoths, Neanderthals, and a Swedish king who once lived in a village there.
items.summary_ko: 몰도바 지역의 문화유산을 다룬 이야기다. 주민들은 매머드와 네안데르탈인, 한때 몰도바 마을에 살았던 스웨덴 왕의 흔적을 새롭게 알아가고 있다.
items.title_en: Moldova Finds Stories of Mammoths and a Swedish King
items.title_ko: 몰도바에서 되살아난 매머드와 스웨덴 왕 이야기
items.title_original: Moldova, former home to a Swedish King and motherland of mammoths: how culture helps the regions to develop - EU NEIGHBOURS east

items.raw_excerpt: Nykyisen Turun alueella on ollut yli sata kylää, joista suuri osa oli olemassa jo 1200-luvulla. Kaupungin kasvun alle jääneistä, enimmäkseen kadonneista kylistä on julkaistu laaja tutkimus.
items.summary_en: The area that is now Turku once had more than 100 villages. Many already existed in the 1200s, but city growth later covered or erased most of them. A large new study looks at these lost villages and what still remains.
items.summary_ko: 지금의 투르쿠 지역에는 한때 100개가 넘는 마을이 있었다. 그중 상당수는 이미 1200년대에 존재했지만, 도시가 커지면서 대부분 사라지거나 묻혔다. 새로 나온 대규모 연구는 이 사라진 마을들과 아직 남은 흔적을 살핀다.
items.title_en: Turku Before the City Had Many Villages
items.title_ko: 도시가 되기 전 투르쿠에는 마을이 많았다
items.title_original: Turku ennen Turkua oli täynnä kyliä – kaupungin rakentaminen on jyrännyt niistä lähes kaikki, mutta jotain jäikin - Yle

items.raw_excerpt: El Año Sorolla refuerza la complicidad del Estado con Madrid, que en 2022 invirtió medio millón de euros en adquirir seis pinturas para el Museo Sorolla, que muestra 114 obras del valenciano y conserva 1.500 en sus almacenes
items.summary_en: Spain's culture ministry has not bought a Sorolla artwork for the Museum of Fine Arts of Valencia for almost 40 years. The report compares this with recent state support for Madrid's Sorolla Museum, which received six paintings in 2022.
items.summary_ko: 스페인 문화부는 거의 40년 동안 발렌시아 미술관을 위해 소로야 작품을 사지 않았다. 기사에서는 2022년 마드리드 소로야 미술관에 작품 여섯 점을 사 준 국가 지원과 비교하고 있다.
items.title_en: Spain Has Not Bought Sorolla Works for Valencia Museum in Decades
items.title_ko: 스페인, 발렌시아 미술관에 소로야 작품 40년 가까이 미구입
items.title_original: Cultura no compra obra de Sorolla al Museo de Bellas Artes de Valencia desde hace casi 40 años - elDiario.es

items.raw_excerpt: TRE GIORNI DI SPORT, GIOCHI, ATTIVITÀ E SORPRESE IN PIAZZA MAGGIORE E PIAZZA NETTUNO
items.summary_en: Strabologna 2026 will open its city festival village in Bologna on Friday. For three days, Piazza Maggiore and Piazza Nettuno will host sports, games, activities, and surprises.

items.raw_excerpt: After twenty-five years of anticipation, Norway’s first dedicated cycling motorway, the Sykkelstamveien, officially opened on Tuesday, June 16th.
items.summary_en: Norway opened its first dedicated cycling motorway on Tuesday, June 16. The Sykkelstamveien opened after twenty-five years of waiting.
items.summary_ko: 노르웨이가 6월 16일 화요일 첫 자전거 전용 고속도로를 열었다. Sykkelstamveien은 25년의 기다림 끝에 공식 개통됐다.

items.title_ko: 노르웨이 첫 자전거 전용 고속도로 개통
items.title_original: Norway opens landmark ‘cycling highway’

items.raw_excerpt: Woodstock, Vermont, has once again proven that nobody does the holidays quite like New England. Named the second-best Christmas village in the world , this Green Mountain gem feels straight out of a storybook—complete with snow-dusted covered bridges, candlelit streets, and the soft jingle of sleigh bells drifting through crisp mountain air. Every December, Woodstock […]
items.summary_en: Woodstock, Vermont was named the second-best Christmas village in the world. The town is praised for its snowy covered bridges, candlelit streets, and classic New England holiday feel.
items.summary_ko: 미국 버몬트주 우드스톡이 세계에서 두 번째로 좋은 크리스마스 마을로 꼽혔습니다. 눈 덮인 지붕 있는 다리, 촛불이 켜진 거리, 뉴잉글랜드 특유의 연말 분위기가 좋은 평가를 받았습니다.

items.raw_excerpt: Ukrainian man’s licence had picture of former UK PM and correct birthdate – but officers did not fall for it
items.summary_en: Dutch police stopped a suspected drunk driver and found a fake licence in the car. The licence showed a picture of former UK prime minister Boris Johnson and had his correct birth date, but officers did not believe it.
items.summary_ko: 네덜란드 경찰이 음주운전 의심 차량을 단속하다가 차 안에서 가짜 운전면허증을 발견했다. 면허증에는 전 영국 총리 보리스 존슨의 사진과 실제 생년월일이 들어 있었지만, 경찰은 속지 않았다.
items.title_en: Dutch police arrest fake Boris Johnson
items.title_ko: 네덜란드 경찰, 가짜 보리스 존슨 운전자 체포
items.title_original: Dutch police arrest fake ‘Boris Johnson’ for suspected drink-driving - The Guardian

items.raw_excerpt: From swimming in the Seine to visiting a bridge-turned artwork, via fireworks and music, here's a look at what's on in summer 2026 in Paris.
items.summary_en: Paris has free summer activities in 2026. The list includes swimming in the Seine, visiting a bridge turned into art, fireworks, and music.
items.summary_ko: 2026년 여름 파리에서는 무료로 즐길 수 있는 활동들이 있다. 센강 수영, 예술 작품으로 바뀐 다리 방문, 불꽃놀이와 음악 행사가 포함된다.

items.raw_excerpt: La Ciudad de Shiyan, en la provincia de Hubei, en China, es la antípoda de Mendoza. Conocé parte de su historia y sus atractivos turísticos.
items.summary_en: Shiyan in Hubei, China, is the antipode of Mendoza. The article introduces the city, its history, and some tourist sights.

items.summary_en: A small town in North Isere is gaining attention because of its location. It sits near Lyon, Grenoble, and Chambery, which helps it attract people interested in real estate.

items.raw_excerpt: Fusion Australia has owned and run the former Hydro Tasmania town in Tasmania's Northern Midlands for 30 years, but is now divesting its assets there, clearing the way for a new generation of residents.
items.summary_en: Fusion Australia has owned and run the former Hydro Tasmania town in Tasmania's Northern Midlands for 30 years. The charity is now selling its assets there, opening the way for new residents.
items.summary_ko: 퓨전 오스트레일리아는 태즈메이니아 북부 미들랜즈의 옛 하이드로 태즈메이니아 마을을 30년 동안 소유하고 운영해 왔다. 이제 이 단체가 현지 자산을 매각하면서 새로운 주민들이 들어올 길이 열리고 있다.

items.summary_en: India's first girls cricket match was held in Kottayam, Kerala, in 1914. The match happened thanks to an Australian missionary named Gwen Kellaway.

items.raw_excerpt: El Gobierno de Oaxaca hizo realidad el techado en escuela primaria, entregó una patrulla e inició la construcción de una cancha de usos múltiples SanSeguir leyendo
items.summary_en: The Oaxaca government completed a roof project at a primary school in San Pedro Cajonos. It also delivered a patrol vehicle and began building a multi-use sports court, along with productive support for the community.
items.summary_ko: 오악사카 주 정부가 산 페드로 카호노스의 한 초등학교 지붕 공사를 마쳤습니다. 순찰차를 전달하고 다목적 운동장 공사도 시작했으며, 지역 생산 활동을 돕는 지원도 함께 제공했습니다.

items.raw_excerpt: Vermont is one of America's greenest states. Of course, that draws visitors, but there are still many crowd-free small towns to find this summer.
items.summary_en: Vermont is known as one of the greenest states in the United States. The article says visitors can still find small towns with fewer crowds this summer.
items.summary_ko: 버몬트는 미국에서 자연이 푸른 주로 잘 알려져 있습니다. 이 글은 이번 여름에도 사람이 덜 붐비는 작은 마을들을 찾을 수 있다고 소개합니다.

items.raw_excerpt: When Swedes talk about celebrating midsommar, they mean Midsummer's Eve, which this year falls on Friday June 19th. It's not a so-called 'red day', but do you still get the day off?
items.summary_en: In Sweden, midsommar usually means Midsummer's Eve. This year it falls on Friday, June 19. It is not a red day, so many people may wonder if they still get the day off.
items.summary_ko: 스웨덴에서 미드솜마르를 기념한다고 하면 보통 한여름 전야제를 뜻한다. 올해는 6월 19일 금요일이다. 법정 공휴일인 ‘빨간 날’은 아니어서, 그래도 쉴 수 있는지 궁금해하는 사람이 많다.
items.title_en: Do people in Sweden get Midsummer's Eve off?
items.title_ko: 스웨덴 한여름 전야제에 쉴 수 있을까?
items.title_original: Do I get a day off in Sweden at Midsummer?

items.raw_excerpt: How When Chai Met Toast Is Coming Home To Kerala with Their New Single Dreamland and Ensuing Album Through their latest single and music video, Kerala origin band When Chai Met Toast is ushering in a new era for their music, while playing an ode to their original sound.
items.summary_en: Kerala-origin band When Chai Met Toast has released a new single and music video called Dreamland. The song starts a new phase for the band while also honoring its early sound.
items.summary_ko: 케랄라 출신 밴드 When Chai Met Toast가 신곡과 뮤직비디오 Dreamland를 공개했다. 이번 곡은 밴드의 새로운 시작을 알리면서도 초창기 음악 색깔에 대한 애정을 담고 있다.
items.title_en: Kerala Band Returns With New Song Dreamland
items.title_ko: 케랄라 밴드, 신곡 Dreamland로 고향의 색을 담다
items.title_original: When Chai Met Toast Is Coming Home To Kerala with Their New Single 'Dreamland' & Ensuing Album - homegrown.co.in

items.raw_excerpt: Expanding the pre-existing Brusels-Strasbourg route in a trail run, Basel could soon have a direct train link with Brussels.
items.summary_en: Switzerland will test a Basel-Brussels train route. The trial would expand the existing Brussels-Strasbourg route and could give Basel a direct link to Brussels.
items.summary_ko: 스위스가 바젤과 브뤼셀을 잇는 열차 노선을 시험 운행할 예정이다. 기존 브뤼셀-스트라스부르 노선을 확장하는 방식으로, 바젤에 브뤼셀 직통 연결이 생길 수 있다.
items.title_en: Basel May Get a Direct Brussels Train
